name: Spicy Cabbage Beef Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans red kidney beans, 16 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onion over medium heat in a skillet.
2. Drain the excess fat.
3. Pour the contents into a crock-Pot.
4. Stir in the chopped cabbage, kidney beans, tomato sauce, water, green bell pepper, picante sauce, beef bouillon cubes, and seasonings.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or High for 3 to 4 hours.
6. Serve when the cabbage is tender.
Serves 10 to 12
